description: A customer reports an unrecognized charge on their debit card statement and wants to dispute it.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and locate the specific transaction in their history.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the customer and the $75.00 charge from 'ShopMart Online'.

nodes.task_description: Temporarily block the customer's debit card to prevent further fraudulent charges.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully places a temporary lock on the debit card.

nodes.task_description: Initiate a chargeback for the disputed transaction and order a new card for the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent files the dispute and successfully orders a replacement card.
